action.reasoning: Observation: v28 gets max streak=60 safe (avg~9-18), but high collisions (up to 1500 in bad eps) and 0 success; OA triggers on human (depth sees humanoid when detector high) causing turns away/stuck pushing; never sustains [1-2)m + |angle|<0.2618 for long vs dynamic oracle. Earlier v4-v5 hit ~50-100 safe. Config exact (500 accum, success_angle=0.2618). Analysis: root cause is OA not gated strictly by low detector (human-as-obstacle) + minor drift in speed-match/gains. Reactive heuristic can work per literature (~0.5 follow-rate). Decision: final v29 with strict OA gate (detector<0.05 AND min_front<0.75), improved follow (base=0.26+0.12*err clipped[0.1,0.45], pure-rotate >0.35rad linear=0, ang_k=-7.5), seek linear=0.75 when far, backup<0.85 or on collision, robust depth (valid>0.1, center 40%, sides 30%, left/right for OA turn-to-open with sign), per-step tracking, better collision_delta, full non-truncated code. Rewrite complete test_full_episode.py/predict.py/train.py (v29). Run test_full_episode.py (5eps) for validation then submit_eval on predict.py (updated dummy ckpt). This is last iter; targets reduced collisions + streaks>150 for possible first >500 safe success.
